title: viola × koehleri
intro: Viola × koehleri, also known as the hybrid viola, is a hybrid plant species that is a cross between Viola sororia and Viola pedunculata, two species of violet flowers. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Viola × koehleri include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
